children.name: WhatsMyName (T)
children.description: OSINT project maintaining a curated JSON database of website detection patterns for username enumeration. Web interface available at whatsmyname.app.
children.bestFor: Username enumeration using community-maintained site detection data
children.output: List of sites where the username exists, based on HTTP response pattern matching
children.opsecNote: Makes HTTP requests to each target site to check for username existence.

children.name: Sylva Identity Discovery (T)
children.description: Open-source CLI tool for username and identity discovery with branch discovery to expand searches as additional linked identities are uncovered.
children.bestFor: Username enumeration with identity branching
children.output: Linked accounts and identities across platforms
children.opsecNote: Makes requests to target platforms to check username existence; external API keys may be used.

children.name: Sherlock (T)
children.description: Python CLI tool that hunts down social media accounts by username across 400+ social networks. Supports Tor routing, proxy configuration, and CSV/XLSX export.
children.bestFor: Mass username enumeration across 400+ sites
children.output: List of discovered profile URLs across social networks
children.opsecNote: Directly queries each target site to check username existence; supports Tor/proxy for anonymity.

children.name: Namechk
children.description: Web-based username and domain availability checker that searches 100+ social media platforms and 36 domain extensions simultaneously.
children.bestFor: Quick username availability check across social media and domains
children.output: Availability status across 100+ platforms and domain extensions
children.opsecNote: Searches are routed through Namechk's servers; target accounts are not directly contacted by the user.

children.name: Thats Them
children.description: Free people search engine aggregating data from 50+ sources. Supports lookups by name, address, phone number, or email.
children.bestFor: People search by name, email, phone, or address
children.input: Name, email address, phone number, or physical address
children.output: Contact info, residential details, demographics, and financial estimates
children.opsecNote: Searches are routed through ThatsThem's servers; the target is not alerted.

children.name: NameCheckup
children.description: Free web-based username and domain availability checker that searches across 20+ social media platforms and 40+ domain extensions with WHOIS lookup support.
children.bestFor: Username and domain availability checking with WHOIS info
children.output: Availability status across social platforms and domain extensions, with WHOIS data
children.opsecNote: Searches are proxied through NameCheckup's servers; no direct contact with target platforms by the user.

children.name: GitFive (T)
children.description: OSINT CLI tool for investigating GitHub profiles. Tracks username/name history, maps emails to accounts, extracts SSH public keys, and exports findings as JSON.
children.bestFor: Deep investigation of GitHub user profiles and email-to-account mapping
children.output: Profile history, linked emails, SSH keys, repository analysis, JSON export
children.opsecNote: Queries GitHub API directly; developer recommends using a secondary GitHub account.

children.name: Sherlock
children.description: Python CLI tool that hunts down social media accounts by username across 400+ social networks. Supports Tor routing, proxy configuration, and CSV/XLSX export.
children.bestFor: Mass username enumeration across 400+ sites
children.output: List of discovered profile URLs across social networks
children.opsecNote: Directly queries each target site to check username existence; supports Tor/proxy for anonymity.

children.name: Names Directory
children.description: Searchable database of 1B+ name combinations collected from public sources. Allows bidirectional lookup to find first names by surname or surnames by first name.
children.bestFor: Finding name combinations and frequency data for a given first or last name
children.output: Associated name combinations with frequency counts
children.opsecNote: Queries a static public database; no contact with any target individual.

children.name: Lullar
children.description: Free people search and username lookup tool that searches across 148+ social media platforms including Instagram, TikTok, Facebook, and LinkedIn.
children.bestFor: Social media profile discovery by username, email, or name
children.input: Email address, full name, or username
children.output: Social media profiles found across 148+ platforms
children.opsecNote: Searches are routed through Lullar's servers; no direct queries from the user to target platforms.

children.name: Amazon Usernames (M)
children.description: Google dork that searches Amazon.com for pages associated with a specific username, surfacing public profiles, wishlists, and reviews.
children.bestFor: Finding Amazon public profiles, wishlists, and review activity by username
children.output: Google search results linking to Amazon pages mentioning the username
children.opsecNote: Query goes to Google, not Amazon directly. Google may log the search but the target is not alerted.

children.name: Github User (M)
children.description: Queries the GitHub public Events API to retrieve a user's recent public activity, including pushes, pull requests, issues, and other repository events.
children.bestFor: Enumerating a GitHub user's recent public activity and repository interactions
children.output: JSON array of public events (pushes, PRs, issues, comments) with timestamps and repo details
children.opsecNote: Unauthenticated API call; GitHub rate-limits by IP (60 req/hr) but does not notify the target user.

children.name: Tinder Usernames (M)
children.description: Accesses a Tinder user's public web profile via their username. The gotinder.com domain redirects to tinder.com.
children.bestFor: Confirming existence of a Tinder profile and viewing public profile details
children.output: Public profile page with name, photo, and basic info if the user has web sharing enabled
children.opsecNote: Simple HTTP GET to a public page; target is not notified of profile views via the web URL.

children.name: Keybase
children.description: Platform for cryptographic identity verification, linking social media accounts, PGP keys, and cryptocurrency addresses to a single profile. Acquired by Zoom in 2020 but still operational.
children.bestFor: Looking up verified social accounts, PGP keys, and crypto wallets tied to a username
children.output: User profile showing verified identities across platforms, PGP keys, cryptocurrency addresses, and devices
children.opsecNote: Public profile lookups are passive web requests. No login required to view profiles.

children.name: MIT PGP Key Server
children.description: MIT PGP Public Key Server for searching, submitting, and removing PGP public keys. Look up keys by name, email, or key ID to find associated cryptographic identities.
children.bestFor: Looking up PGP public keys associated with a username or email address
children.input: Name, email address, or key ID
children.output: PGP public key data, key fingerprints, associated UIDs/email addresses, and key metadata
children.opsecNote: Public key server query; no authentication required and target is not notified of lookups.

children.name: ProtonMail users (M)
children.description: Queries ProtonMail's HKP-compatible PGP key server to look up the public key for a ProtonMail username. A successful response confirms the account exists.
children.bestFor: Confirming whether a ProtonMail username exists and retrieving its PGP public key
children.output: PGP key index with public key fingerprint, algorithm, creation timestamp, and email UID
children.opsecNote: Unauthenticated API query to ProtonMail's public key server. Target user is not notified. Enables user enumeration.

children.name: ProtonMail Domains (M)
children.description: Queries ProtonMail's HKP key server with a full email address to check for a PGP public key. Useful for identifying ProtonMail users on custom domains.
children.bestFor: Checking if an email address on a custom domain is hosted on ProtonMail
children.input: Full email address (any domain that may be hosted on ProtonMail)
children.output: PGP key index with public key fingerprint, algorithm, creation timestamp, and email UID
children.opsecNote: Unauthenticated public HKP endpoint. Target is not notified. Can reveal whether a custom domain uses ProtonMail.

children.name: Sylva Identity Discovery (T)
children.description: Identity discovery utility that searches GitHub and PGP key servers to link identities across platforms using email addresses, usernames, or PGP keys.
children.bestFor: Identity correlation via GitHub and PGP
children.output: Linked identities, GitHub profiles, PGP keys
children.opsecNote: Queries public GitHub and PGP servers without direct target contact.

children.name: ThatsThem
children.description: Reverse email lookup tool that searches a database of hundreds of millions of emails to reveal name, address, phone number, and public records associated with an email address.
children.bestFor: Reverse email lookup, person identification
children.output: Name, address, phone number, education
children.opsecNote: Queries ThatsThem's public database without alerting the target.

children.name: Hunter
children.description: Email finder and verifier that discovers business email addresses from company domains, names, and social profiles with up to 98% accuracy rate.
children.bestFor: Business email discovery, email verification
children.input: Domain name, person name, or company info
children.output: Verified business email addresses
children.opsecNote: Queries Hunter's database of public emails; does not contact targets.

children.name: Email to Address (R)
children.description: Melissa.com's data quality and verification service that validates and enriches email addresses with supplementary contact information.
children.bestFor: Email validation, address enrichment
children.output: Validated email, postal address, phone
children.opsecNote: Data verification service; does not perform reconnaissance.

children.name: VoilaNorbert
children.description: Email finder and verifier with 98% success rate that discovers business emails by company/domain, person name, or LinkedIn profile with bulk upload capability.
children.bestFor: Business email discovery, bulk email finding
children.output: Business email addresses, verification status
children.opsecNote: Searches public email database; does not contact targets directly.

children.name: GHunt (T)
children.description: Offensive Google framework that investigates Google accounts using email addresses to uncover YouTube channels, Google Photos, Maps reviews, and associated artifacts.
children.bestFor: Google account investigation, YouTube/Google Photos OSINT
children.output: YouTube channels, Google Photos, Maps reviews, device info
children.opsecNote: Requires Google login via browser extension; may be detected by Google.

children.name: OSINT Industries
children.description: Account linking service that extracts all registered accounts tied to an email or phone across 500+ platforms including social media, messaging apps, and lifestyle services.
children.bestFor: Account enumeration, breach detection, digital footprint mapping
children.input: Email address, phone number, username, or crypto wallet
children.output: Linked accounts, breach information, geospatial data, timeline
children.opsecNote: Scours public websites and databases without contacting the target.

children.name: theHarvester (T)
children.description: Command-line tool for gathering emails, subdomains, IPs, and URLs from public sources.
children.bestFor: Email harvesting, subdomain enumeration, passive recon
children.output: Email addresses, subdomains, IPs, URLs
children.opsecNote: Queries third-party search engines and APIs. Does not contact the target directly.

children.name: Infoga (T)
children.description: Python-based email OSINT tool that gathers email account information (IP, hostname, country) from search engines, PGP servers, and Shodan, with breach checking via haveibeenpwned.
children.bestFor: Early-stage email reconnaissance, information gathering
children.output: IP addresses, hostnames, country, breach status
children.opsecNote: Queries search engines and public APIs without direct target contact.

children.name: Skymem
children.description: Email finder that discovers company and personal email addresses by domain or name, with bulk search, email list creation, and advanced filtering capabilities.
children.bestFor: Email discovery by domain, bulk email list creation
children.input: Domain name or person name + domain
children.output: Email addresses, bulk email lists
children.opsecNote: Scrapes and aggregates public email data from websites and profiles.

children.name: Epieos Email Tool
children.description: Freemium OSINT tool performing email reverse lookups to uncover associated social media profiles across 120+ websites and services with breach detection.
children.bestFor: Email reverse lookup, social media profile discovery
children.output: Associated social media profiles, forum posts, breach info
children.opsecNote: Passive reconnaissance across 120+ websites; does not alert the target.

children.name: breach.vip
children.description: Free database search engine providing access to 1000+ breach databases for research, email searching, and analysis of compromised credentials.
children.bestFor: Breach database search, credential lookup
children.input: Email, domain, Discord ID, or phone number
children.output: Breach records, leaked credentials
children.opsecNote: Queries aggregated public breach databases.

children.name: Holehe (T)
children.description: Python-based email enumeration tool that checks if an email is registered across 120+ websites and services using password-reset mechanisms.
children.bestFor: Email account enumeration, service detection
children.output: List of websites where email is registered
children.opsecNote: Uses password-reset functionality without sending emails or alerting targets.

children.name: Email Format
children.description: Tool for analyzing and discovering corporate email address patterns and formats to predict valid employee email addresses within an organization.
children.bestFor: Corporate email pattern analysis, email format discovery
children.input: Sample email addresses or company info
children.output: Predicted email format patterns
children.opsecNote: Statistical analysis of publicly known email patterns.

children.name: Email Permutator
children.description: OSINT tool that generates all possible email address combinations from a person's name and domain(s) for reconnaissance and email guessing.
children.bestFor: Email pattern generation, targeted email guessing
children.output: List of possible email address variations
children.opsecNote: Generates permutations without any network contact.

children.name: Reacher Github (T)
children.description: Open-source Rust-based email verification API that checks email deliverability without sending messages, detecting catch-all and disposable addresses.
children.bestFor: Email verification, bounce detection, list cleaning
children.output: Deliverability status, MX records, bounce type
children.opsecNote: Verifies email existence through MTA queries without sending mail.

children.name: Reacher Demo
children.description: Hosted demo of the Reacher email verification API allowing free testing of email validation and deliverability checks online.
children.bestFor: Email verification testing, demonstration
children.output: Deliverability status, bounce information
children.opsecNote: Passive MTA-based verification without sending emails.

children.name: MailScrap
children.description: Email verification tool that connects to mail servers to verify mailbox existence and removes disposable email addresses from lists.
children.bestFor: Email validation, list cleaning, disposable email detection
children.output: Validation status, mailbox existence
children.opsecNote: Connects to mail servers for verification without sending messages.

children.name: Read Notify
children.description: Email tracking and read receipt service that monitors email opens and engagement, useful for confirming email validity through delivery.
children.bestFor: Email delivery confirmation, read receipt tracking
children.output: Delivery and read status
children.opsecNote: Sends tracking pixels; may alert targets to monitoring.

children.name: Email Reputation
children.description: Tool that checks email reputation, risk scoring, and breach history to identify phishing emails, compromised accounts, and risky addresses.
children.bestFor: Email reputation checking, risk assessment
children.output: Reputation score, risk level, breach history
children.opsecNote: Passive database lookup without target contact.

children.name: MailboxValidator
children.description: Email verification API that validates email deliverability, detects catch-all addresses, and provides risk scoring for bulk email list cleaning.
children.bestFor: Email validation, list cleaning, bounce prevention
children.output: Validation status, risk score, catch-all detection
children.opsecNote: Server-based verification without sending emails.

children.name: VerifyEmail (R$)
children.description: Email verification service offering both free and premium tiers for validating email addresses and maintaining clean mailing lists.
children.bestFor: Email validation, list cleaning
children.output: Validation status, deliverability info
children.opsecNote: Passive email verification without sending messages.

children.name: Have I been pwned?
children.description: Database of breached credentials and email addresses from known data breaches.
children.bestFor: Breach detection, credential exposure checks
children.input: Email address, phone number, password hash
children.output: Breach names, breach dates, exposed data types
children.opsecNote: Queries breach database via API. Target is not notified of lookups.

children.name: Hudson Rock
children.description: Infostealer threat intelligence platform that searches a database of compromised devices and stolen credentials to identify if emails have been exposed via malware infections.
children.bestFor: Infostealer detection, breach assessment, device compromise verification
children.input: Email address, domain, username, or IP
children.output: Infostealer hits, compromised account data, breach details
children.opsecNote: Queries public infostealer database compiled from malware captures.

children.name: DeHashed (R)
children.description: Modern breach search engine indexing historical breach data over a decade old, enabling searches by email, username, password, domain, phone, and IP address.
children.bestFor: Breach searching, credential lookup, historical breach analysis
children.input: Email, username, password, domain, phone, or IP
children.output: Breach records, exposed credentials, breach dates
children.opsecNote: Searches aggregated public breach databases.

children.name: Vigilante.pw
children.description: Breach database directory and search platform raising awareness of data breaches by aggregating publicly leaked database information and breach details.
children.bestFor: Breach research, public breach database navigation
children.output: Breach records, exposed data information
children.opsecNote: Aggregates and indexes publicly disclosed breach data.

children.name: MxToolbox
children.description: Email deliverability diagnostics tool that checks MX records, SPF, DKIM, DMARC configuration, and server health to prevent email delivery issues.
children.bestFor: Email server diagnostics, deliverability testing, DNS validation
children.output: MX records, SPF/DKIM/DMARC status, blacklist info
children.opsecNote: Public DNS lookups and SMTP diagnostics without target alerting.

children.name: Recon-ng (T)
children.description: Full-featured web reconnaissance framework with independent modules for data gathering.
children.bestFor: Modular web recon, API-driven data collection
children.output: Contacts, hosts, credentials, ports via module-specific results
children.opsecNote: Queries third-party APIs and data sources. Does not probe the target unless specific modules are configured to do so.

children.name: theHarvester (T)
children.description: Command-line tool for gathering emails, subdomains, IPs, and URLs from public sources.
children.bestFor: Email harvesting, subdomain enumeration, passive recon
children.output: Email addresses, subdomains, IPs, URLs
children.opsecNote: Queries third-party search engines and APIs. Does not contact the target directly.

children.name: Shodan
children.description: Search engine for internet-connected devices. Find open ports, services, and vulnerabilities across the public internet.
children.bestFor: Port scanning, banner grabbing, IoT discovery
children.output: Open ports, services, banners, CVEs
children.opsecNote: Queries cached scan data. Does not directly probe the target.

children.name: BuiltWith
children.description: Technology profiler that identifies the tech stack, analytics, and frameworks used by websites.
children.bestFor: Technology stack identification, competitor analysis
children.output: Technology list, analytics IDs, hosting info, historical tech changes
children.opsecNote: Queries cached technology profiles. Does not contact the target.

children.name: Censys
children.description: Internet-wide scanner and search engine for hosts, certificates, and services.
children.bestFor: Certificate discovery, host enumeration, exposure monitoring
children.input: Domain, IP, certificate fingerprint, search query
children.output: Host details, open ports, TLS certificates, service banners
children.opsecNote: Queries pre-scanned data. Does not probe the target directly.

children.name: BuiltWith
children.description: Technology profiler that identifies the tech stack, analytics, and frameworks used by websites.
children.bestFor: Technology stack identification, competitor analysis
children.output: Technology list, analytics IDs, hosting info, historical tech changes
children.opsecNote: Queries cached technology profiles. Does not contact the target.

children.name: Follow That Page
children.description: Website monitoring service that checks pages for changes and sends alerts when tracked content updates. Supports keyword-based notifications for focused monitoring.
children.bestFor: Tracking updates on specific web pages by keyword
children.input: Target page URL and optional keyword filters
children.output: Email alerts showing detected page changes
children.opsecNote: Monitoring requests are performed by Follow That Page infrastructure rather than directly from the investigator's workstation.

children.name: Urlwatch
children.description: Open-source Python CLI tool for monitoring webpages and feeds for changes. Supports multiple filters, reporters, and scheduled checks via local automation.
children.bestFor: Self-hosted web page change monitoring automation
children.input: URLs, feeds, and local watch configuration
children.output: Diffs and alerts through email, console, or integrations
children.opsecNote: Can run locally or on controlled infrastructure, allowing investigators to manage request origin and monitoring cadence.

children.name: WatchThatPage
children.description: Web-based page monitoring platform that detects content changes and notifies users by email. Useful for tracking updates on websites without RSS feeds.
children.bestFor: Monitoring static web pages for updates over time
children.input: Web page URL and watch configuration
children.output: Email notifications and change history snapshots
children.opsecNote: Page checks originate from WatchThatPage systems instead of directly from the investigator.

children.name: ChangeDetect
children.description: Open-source website change detection platform with both self-hosted and hosted options. Supports visual diffs, notifications, and automation workflows.
children.bestFor: Flexible page change monitoring with self-hosted control
children.input: Target URL and optional monitoring rules/selectors
children.output: Change alerts, snapshots, and webhook/integration notifications
children.opsecNote: When self-hosted, investigators control infrastructure and request origin; hosted mode proxies checks through provider systems.

children.name: Google Trends
children.description: Google analytics interface for comparing search interest trends across terms, regions, and time windows. Includes related queries and topic momentum insights.
children.bestFor: Tracking public interest shifts in terms and topics
children.input: Keywords, geography, category, and date range filters
children.output: Relative search-interest graphs and related-query suggestions
children.opsecNote: Queries are conducted within Google's public trends interface and do not directly interact with investigation targets.

children.name: DNSViz
children.description: DNS and DNSSEC analysis platform that visualizes delegation chains and cryptographic validation paths. Helps diagnose trust and signing issues in domain configurations.
children.bestFor: Visual DNSSEC validation and DNS misconfiguration analysis
children.output: DNS resolution graphs, DNSSEC status, and validation diagnostics
children.opsecNote: Analysis runs against public DNS infrastructure without direct interaction with domain owners.

children.name: Sn1per (T)
children.description: Automated reconnaissance and penetration testing framework that orchestrates vulnerability scans and attack-surface discovery workflows.
children.bestFor: Automated offensive security reconnaissance pipelines
children.input: Target domains, hosts, ranges, or web applications
children.output: Consolidated scan findings, vulnerabilities, and recon artifacts
children.opsecNote: Directly probes target infrastructure and can generate detectable scanning traffic.

children.name: Online Nikto scanner
children.description: Web-based interface for running Nikto vulnerability checks against web servers. Provides quick external testing without local deployment.
children.bestFor: Quick browser-based web server vulnerability scanning
children.output: Nikto scan report of detected web server issues
children.opsecNote: Initiates direct security probing of target web servers and is likely to be logged by defenders.

children.name: Zone-H.org
children.description: Archive of reported website defacements and related incident metadata maintained by the Zone-H community.
children.bestFor: Historical tracking of website defacement incidents
children.input: Search terms, domains, or browsing archive filters
children.output: Defacement records with timestamps and mirrored evidence
children.opsecNote: Uses a third-party archive and does not require direct interaction with target infrastructure.

children.name: RobotsDisallowed
children.description: Curated wordlist derived from robots.txt disallow paths, used for discovery and content enumeration in security testing.
children.bestFor: Directory and content discovery wordlist generation
children.output: Path candidates likely to expose sensitive or hidden content
children.opsecNote: Repository usage is passive; OPSEC risk comes from downstream active scanning tools that consume the list.

children.name: Belati (T)
children.description: Python OSINT framework that aggregates data from multiple online sources and automates collection workflows for investigations.
children.bestFor: CLI-based multi-source OSINT collection automation
children.input: Investigation keywords, handles, domains, or entity identifiers
children.output: Collected artifacts from integrated OSINT data sources
children.opsecNote: Collection relies on public-source queries; risk depends on enabled modules and target-facing lookups.

children.name: Burp Suite (T)
children.description: Web security testing suite for intercepting, manipulating, and scanning HTTP(S) traffic in web application assessments.
children.bestFor: Manual and automated web application security testing
children.input: Target web application traffic and scan targets
children.output: Intercepted requests, vulnerability findings, and test artifacts
children.opsecNote: Active testing traffic is sent to targets and can trigger alerts or defensive controls.

children.name: EyeWitness (T)
children.description: Reconnaissance tool that captures screenshots of web services and helps identify technologies and exposed login interfaces at scale.
children.bestFor: Visual triage of large target lists and exposed services
children.input: List of URLs, hosts, or network service endpoints
children.output: Screenshots, service metadata, and summary HTML reports
children.opsecNote: Primarily collects presentation-layer snapshots; network requests are still sent to targets but with lower interaction depth than exploit scans.

children.name: Hunting-New-Registered-Domains (T)
children.description: OSINT workflow and scripts focused on identifying newly registered domains likely associated with phishing and brand abuse.
children.bestFor: Detecting suspicious newly registered domains for threat hunting
children.input: Keywords, domain feeds, and candidate domain lists
children.output: Prioritized domain candidates for further investigation
children.opsecNote: Analysis is based on external data sources and does not require direct target interaction by default.

children.name: International Domain Name Conversion Tool
children.description: Web utility for converting internationalized domain names between Unicode and Punycode representations.
children.bestFor: IDN normalization and Unicode/Punycode translation
children.input: Domain name in Unicode or Punycode format
children.output: Converted domain representation in alternate encoding
children.opsecNote: Conversion operations are deterministic and do not involve contacting investigation targets.

children.name: Online Nikto scanner
children.description: Browser-based Nikto scanning endpoint for identifying common web server misconfigurations and known weaknesses.
children.bestFor: Fast external vulnerability checks against web targets
children.output: Web vulnerability scan results and issue summary
children.opsecNote: Performs active probing against target systems that may be detected and logged.

children.name: theHarvester (T)
children.description: Command-line tool for gathering emails, subdomains, IPs, and URLs from public sources.
children.bestFor: Email harvesting, subdomain enumeration, passive recon
children.output: Email addresses, subdomains, IPs, URLs
children.opsecNote: Queries third-party search engines and APIs. Does not contact the target directly.

children.name: SpiderFoot (T)
children.description: Automated OSINT collection tool with 200+ modules for reconnaissance and threat intelligence.
children.bestFor: Automated recon, attack surface mapping, threat intelligence
children.input: Domain, IP, email, name, phone, subnet
children.output: Correlated intelligence graph, structured findings across modules
children.opsecNote: Some modules actively probe targets. Review module settings before running.

children.name: MaxMind Demo
children.description: Web-based IP geolocation demo with location, ASN, and network data from MaxMind's GeoIP database.
children.bestFor: Quick IP geolocation
children.output: Country, region, city, coordinates, ASN
children.opsecNote: Queries MaxMind; submissions logged.

children.name: IPv4/IPv6 lists by country code
children.description: Database of IPv4 and IPv6 address ranges organized by country for geographic IP filtering.
children.bestFor: Country-level IP enumeration
children.output: IP ranges in CIDR notation
children.opsecNote: Passive lookup of public IP allocations.

children.name: IP2Location.com
children.description: Commercial IP geolocation service with free demo and database. Provides location, proxy detection, and network data.
children.bestFor: Accurate geolocation with proxy detection
children.output: Location, ASN, proxy type, VPN status, timezone
children.opsecNote: Passive database lookup; free tier limited.

children.name: IP Fingerprints
children.description: Reverse IP lookup service identifying all domains hosted on a given IP address.
children.bestFor: Find domains on shared hosting
children.output: List of domains on IP
children.opsecNote: Uses public DNS reverse lookup data.

children.name: DB-IP
children.description: Lightweight IP geolocation API covering 46M+ IPv4/IPv6 blocks with city-level accuracy.
children.bestFor: Accurate IP geolocation with developer API
children.output: Location, timezone, ISP, coordinates
children.opsecNote: Passive database lookup; free API rate limited.

children.name: IP Location Finder
children.description: Web-based tool for IP geolocation with maps and detailed location information.
children.bestFor: Quick IP location with maps
children.output: City, coordinates, ISP, hostname
children.opsecNote: Passive lookup; no notification to target.

children.name: Info Sniper
children.description: Multi-field reverse OSINT tool for IP, email, phone lookups with social media enumeration.
children.bestFor: Multi-field reverse lookup (IP/email/phone)
children.output: Associated accounts and social profiles
children.opsecNote: Correlates public data; paid features available.

children.name: utrace
children.description: IP geolocation and reverse DNS lookup tool with network traceroute visualization.
children.bestFor: IP location and traceroute
children.output: Location, ASN, reverse DNS, route path
children.opsecNote: Traceroute is active; geolocation is passive.

children.name: urlscan.io
children.description: Website scanner analyzing URLs and domains for malicious content with infrastructure intelligence.
children.bestFor: URL/domain scanning for malware and phishing
children.output: Screenshot, DNS, IP, certificates, cookies
children.opsecNote: Passive scanning; no direct contact with target.

children.name: Spyse
children.description: Internet assets search engine collecting and analyzing public data for attack surface management.
children.bestFor: Internet asset discovery and reconnaissance
children.output: Subdomains, services, vulnerabilities, data breaches
children.opsecNote: Passive data collection; requires account for full access.

children.name: Shodan
children.description: Search engine for internet-connected devices, providing visibility into exposed services and vulnerabilities.
children.bestFor: Find exposed IoT and network services
children.output: Service banners, open ports, vulnerabilities, location
children.opsecNote: Passive data collection; InternetDB API free for non-commercial use.

children.name: Netlas.io
children.description: Comprehensive internet scanning platform with OSINT, DNS, and WHOIS data. Free tier: 50 requests/day.
children.bestFor: Internet asset reconnaissance with web, DNS, WHOIS
children.output: Open ports, services, certificates, DNS records, WHOIS
children.opsecNote: Passive scanning with account-based rate limits.

children.name: Portmap
children.description: Port mapping tool that scans for open ports and services on target IP addresses.
children.bestFor: Port scanning and service discovery
children.output: Open ports, service types, versions
children.opsecNote: Active port scanning probes target network.

children.name: Scans.io
children.description: Archive of internet-wide scan data including censys scans and other reconnaissance data.
children.bestFor: Historical internet scan data access
children.output: Historical scan results, service history
children.opsecNote: Passive access to historical scanning archives.

children.name: Nmap (T)
children.description: Open-source network mapping and port scanning tool with OS detection and service version identification.
children.bestFor: Network reconnaissance and port scanning
children.output: Open ports, OS type, service versions, MAC addresses
children.opsecNote: Active scanning tool; generates network traffic.

children.name: Online Port scanner
children.description: Web-based port scanner checking open ports on target IP addresses without installation.
children.bestFor: Quick port scanning without tools
children.output: Open ports, response times
children.opsecNote: Active port scanning; limited to common ports on free tier.

children.name: Internet Census Search
children.description: Search interface for the Shodan-like internet census data and open services.
children.bestFor: Search open services and devices
children.output: List of exposed services and IPs
children.opsecNote: Passive data search of known internet census.

children.name: Criminal IP Search
children.description: IP reputation and threat intelligence platform analyzing malicious IP addresses and attacks.
children.bestFor: IP reputation and malicious activity analysis
children.output: Threat reports, activity logs, attack types
children.opsecNote: Passive threat intelligence lookup.

children.name: Scanless (T)
children.description: Command-line tool for port scanning without leaving traces on target using third-party services.
children.bestFor: Stealthy port scanning via proxies
children.output: Open port results
children.opsecNote: Routes scans through third-party services for stealth.

children.name: BinaryEdge (R)
children.description: Commercial security research platform with internet-wide scanning and module-based detection.
children.bestFor: Commercial internet threat intelligence
children.output: Services, vulnerabilities, threat modules
children.opsecNote: Commercial threat intelligence requiring subscription.

children.name: Masscan (T)
children.description: Ultra-fast TCP port scanner designed for scanning large IP ranges and entire networks.
children.bestFor: Large-scale network port scanning
children.output: Open ports, response times
children.opsecNote: Active scanner; generates significant network traffic.

children.name: ASlookup.com
children.description: BGP and autonomous system lookup tool for finding IP ranges and ownership information.
children.bestFor: BGP and ASN lookup
children.output: IP ranges, organization, peering info
children.opsecNote: Passive lookup of public BGP data.

children.name: Port scanner Online
children.description: Simple web-based port scanner for checking common ports on target IPs.
children.bestFor: Quick port availability checks
children.output: Port status (open/closed)
children.opsecNote: Active probing; may be logged by firewalls.

children.name: Onyphe
children.description: Cyber defense search engine with internet scanning, threat intelligence, and attack surface management.
children.bestFor: Internet asset discovery and threat intel
children.output: Services, vulnerabilities, certificates, datasources
children.opsecNote: Passive intelligence from public sources.

children.name: IPv4 CIDR Report
children.description: Tool for analyzing IPv4 CIDR blocks and finding contained IP addresses and subnets.
children.bestFor: CIDR block analysis and subnet enumeration
children.output: IP ranges, subnet breakdown
children.opsecNote: Passive analysis of IP allocation data.

children.name: Reverse.report
children.description: Comprehensive reverse lookup tool for IP to domain, email, and phone number associations.
children.bestFor: Reverse IP and domain lookups
children.output: Associated domains, subdomains, history
children.opsecNote: Passive lookup of DNS and WHOIS data.

children.name: Team Cymru IP to ASN
children.description: IP to ASN mapping tool providing autonomous system ownership and prefix information.
children.bestFor: IP to ASN mapping
children.output: ASN, organization, prefix
children.opsecNote: Passive lookup of BGP and WHOIS data.

children.name: IP to ASN DB
children.description: Database and API service for looking up which ASN owns a given IP address.
children.bestFor: IP to ASN lookup with historical data
children.output: ASN, organization, prefix, company info
children.opsecNote: Passive database lookup.

children.name: Hacker Target - Reverse DNS
children.description: Reverse DNS lookup tool and API finding domain names associated with IP addresses.
children.bestFor: Reverse DNS lookup of IP addresses
children.output: Associated domains and PTR records
children.opsecNote: Passive DNS lookup; includes free API tier.

children.name: IPv6 CIDR Report
children.description: CIDR block analysis tool for IPv6 address ranges and subnet enumeration.
children.bestFor: IPv6 CIDR block analysis
children.output: IPv6 ranges, subnet breakdown
children.opsecNote: Passive analysis of IPv6 allocation data.

children.name: Hurricane Electric BGP Toolkit
children.description: BGP and network routing analysis tools including AS to prefix lookup and BGP prefix information.
children.bestFor: BGP analysis and routing intelligence
children.output: BGP routes, peering, organization info
children.opsecNote: Passive lookup of public BGP data.

children.name: BGP Malicious Content Ranking
children.description: Platform ranking ASNs and BGP prefixes by malicious content and security threats.
children.bestFor: Identify malicious ASNs and networks
children.output: Threat ranking, malicious activity metrics
children.opsecNote: Passive threat intelligence from public sources.

children.name: PeeringDB
children.description: Database of internet exchange points, member networks, and AS relationships for network mapping.
children.bestFor: Internet peering and AS relationship mapping
children.output: Peering relationships, exchange points, contacts
children.opsecNote: Passive lookup of public peering data.

children.name: BGP Tools
children.description: Collection of BGP analysis and AS number lookup tools for network intelligence.
children.bestFor: BGP routing and AS analysis
children.output: Routes, prefixes, organizations
children.opsecNote: Passive analysis of public BGP data.

children.name: IP Void
children.description: IP reputation and threat intelligence service analyzing blacklist status and security risks.
children.bestFor: Check IP reputation and blacklist status
children.output: Threat score, blacklist status, reports
children.opsecNote: Passive reputation lookup; account needed for full data.

children.name: ExoneraTor
children.description: Tool for checking if an IP address belonged to Tor at a specific date.
children.bestFor: Verify Tor relay membership by date
children.output: Tor exit/entry node status confirmation
children.opsecNote: Passive historical Tor relay lookup from public archives.

children.name: Grey Noise
children.description: Platform for analyzing internet background noise and identifying benign scanning activity.
children.bestFor: Distinguish malicious from benign internet activity
children.output: Classification, scanner type, threat assessment
children.opsecNote: Passive threat intelligence; free tier available.

children.name: Blocklist.de
children.description: Community-contributed blocklist of IP addresses involved in attacks and malicious activity.
children.bestFor: Check IP blacklist status
children.output: Blacklist status, attack types logged
children.opsecNote: Passive lookup of community blocklist.

children.name: DShield API
children.description: API and database of security events and IPs involved in attacks monitored by SANS.
children.bestFor: Query IPs involved in attacks
children.output: Attack reports, threat activity
children.opsecNote: Passive threat intelligence from SANS monitored networks.

children.name: FireHOL IP Lists
children.description: Collection of firewall-friendly IP lists for blocking malicious and spam sources.
children.bestFor: Block malicious/spam IP sources
children.output: Blacklist membership status
children.opsecNote: Passive lookup of public IP reputation lists.

children.name: Project Honey Pot
children.description: Global honeypot network collecting spam and attack data with IP reputation service.
children.bestFor: Check IP for spam and attack history
children.output: Threat score, spam reports, attack activity
children.opsecNote: Passive lookup of honeypot-collected threat data.

children.name: IP Fingerprints - Reverse IP Lookup
children.description: Find all domains hosted on a shared IP address through reverse IP lookup.
children.bestFor: Find domains on shared hosting
children.output: List of domains on IP
children.opsecNote: Passive DNS reverse lookup.

children.name: Bing IP Search (D)
children.description: Bing search operator for finding domains and subdomains hosted on a specific IP address.
children.bestFor: Find domains on IP using Bing index
children.output: Domains indexed by Bing on that IP
children.opsecNote: Passive search using Bing's public index.

children.name: TCP/IP Utils - Domain Neighbors
children.description: Find all domains on the same IP and subdomain information via reverse IP lookups.
children.bestFor: Identify related domains on same IP
children.output: Neighbor domains, IP info
children.opsecNote: Passive DNS and IP lookup data.

children.name: MyIPNeighbors
children.description: Reverse IP lookup tool for discovering all domains and subdomains on an IP address.
children.bestFor: Find all domains on same shared IP
children.output: List of domains on IP, subdomains
children.opsecNote: Passive DNS reverse lookup.

children.name: CloudFlare Watch
children.description: Tool for identifying and analyzing websites protected by Cloudflare's CDN and security services.
children.bestFor: Identify Cloudflare-protected sites
children.output: Cloudflare status, origin IP (if discoverable)
children.opsecNote: Passive lookup of Cloudflare configurations.

children.name: CloudFail (T)
children.description: Tool for finding origin IPs of Cloudflare-protected websites through enumeration techniques.
children.bestFor: Bypass Cloudflare to find origin IP
children.output: Origin IP address (if discoverable)
children.opsecNote: Uses active enumeration and DNS history techniques.

children.name: WiGLE: Wireless Network Mapping
children.description: Global database of wireless networks (WiFi, Bluetooth, cellular) with mapping and signal strength data.
children.bestFor: Map wireless networks and find signal coverage
children.output: Network locations, signal maps, network details
children.opsecNote: Crowdsourced wireless network data; passive lookup.

children.name: OpenCellid: Database of Cell Towers
children.description: Open database of cellular tower locations and coverage for mobile network geolocation.
children.bestFor: Find cellular tower locations and coverage
children.output: Tower coordinates, operator, coverage area
children.opsecNote: Passive lookup of public cellular network data.

children.name: Wireshark
children.description: Open-source network packet analyzer for deep packet inspection and network troubleshooting.
children.bestFor: Network packet analysis and protocol debugging
children.output: Detailed packet analysis, protocol breakdown
children.opsecNote: Tool-dependent; passive capture or active sniffing possible.

children.name: NetworkMiner
children.description: Passive network forensics tool for extracting files and data from network traffic captures.
children.bestFor: Network forensics and file extraction from traffic
children.output: Extracted files, metadata, network sessions
children.opsecNote: Passive analysis of already-captured traffic.

children.name: Packet Total
children.description: Online platform for uploading and analyzing network packet captures (PCAP files).
children.bestFor: Cloud-based network forensics analysis
children.output: Traffic analysis, threat indicators, IoCs
children.opsecNote: Passive analysis of PCAP; consider privacy of uploaded data.

children.name: checkip (T)
children.description: Command-line utility for checking local machine IP address and network connectivity.
children.bestFor: Display local IP and network info
children.output: Local IP, gateway, DNS servers
children.opsecNote: Passive system utility; local only.

children.name: Ki.tc
children.description: IP logging service that generates trackable links for IP/browser info collection.
children.bestFor: Generate trackable links to log visitor IPs
children.output: Tracker link, IP logs, browser info
children.opsecNote: Creates tracking mechanism; detection depends on how link is used.

children.name: Grabify
children.description: URL shortener service that logs IP addresses and device information of link clickers.
children.bestFor: Shorten URLs and log visitor IPs
children.output: Short URL with IP logging
children.opsecNote: Creates tracking link; malicious uses common.

children.name: IP Logger
children.description: IP logging and URL shortening service tracking visitor IP, location, and browser data.
children.bestFor: Track visitor IPs through shortened links
children.output: Logging URL, visitor IP/location data
children.opsecNote: Tracking service; ethical and legal concerns apply.

children.name: Fedifinder
children.description: Web tool that scanned Twitter profiles to find Fediverse/Mastodon handles among your contacts and exported them as CSV. The hosted instance now returns HTTP 410 and is no longer functional due to Twitter API restrictions.
children.bestFor: Finding Twitter contacts who moved to Mastodon/Fediverse
children.output: CSV list of discovered Fediverse handles from your Twitter contacts
children.opsecNote: Requires Twitter OAuth authentication; scans public bios and tweets of followed accounts.

children.name: Fediverse Observer
children.description: Real-time dashboard tracking Fediverse instances across Mastodon, Pleroma, Misskey, PeerTube, and other ActivityPub platforms with server statistics and geographic mapping.
children.bestFor: Discovering and mapping Fediverse instances by software, country, or size
children.input: Search filters (software type, country, language, instance name)
children.output: Instance list with user counts, uptime, software version, registration status, and geographic location
children.opsecNote: Queries the Fediverse Observer database, not individual instances; no contact with target servers.

children.name: Fediverse_OSINT (T)
children.description: Python CLI tool for checking whether a domain belongs to the Fediverse and hunting usernames across discoverable Fediverse servers.
children.bestFor: Cross-instance Fediverse user and content search
children.output: User profiles and posts found across Fediverse instances
children.opsecNote: Queries multiple Fediverse instances directly; requests may be logged by instance administrators.

children.name: Masto (T)
children.description: Python-based Mastodon OSINT tool for investigating user accounts across instances. Retrieves profile details, toots, followers, and account metadata.
children.bestFor: Mastodon user profile investigation and account analysis
children.output: Profile details, recent toots, follower/following lists, account creation date, and metadata
children.opsecNote: Makes API requests directly to the target Mastodon instance; instance admins can see request logs.

children.name: TikTok (M)
children.description: Direct TikTok profile lookup by manually editing the username in the URL. Quick way to check if a target has a TikTok presence.
children.bestFor: Quick TikTok profile existence check
children.output: Public TikTok profile page with videos, bio, and follower counts
children.opsecNote: Standard web request to TikTok; profile views are not visible to the account owner without login.

children.name: TikTok-OSINT (T)
children.description: Python CLI tool for collecting OSINT data from TikTok profiles including user metadata, video listings, and engagement statistics. Last updated October 2022.
children.bestFor: Automated TikTok profile data collection
children.output: User metadata, video listings, engagement stats, and follower data
children.opsecNote: Makes direct API requests to TikTok servers; may trigger rate limiting.

children.name: Unfurl
children.description: Web and CLI tool that extracts and visualizes metadata embedded in URLs, including TikTok share links, timestamps, and tracking parameters. Also installable locally via Python.
children.bestFor: URL metadata extraction and timestamp analysis
children.output: Visual graph of extracted URL components, timestamps, and embedded identifiers
children.opsecNote: Parses URL structure locally in browser or on the Unfurl server; does not contact the target platform. Local install available for sensitive investigations.

children.name: yt-dlp (T)
children.description: Feature-rich command-line video downloader supporting 1000+ sites including TikTok. Extracts video files, metadata, thumbnails, subtitles, and comments.
children.bestFor: Downloading TikTok videos and extracting metadata for preservation
children.input: TikTok video URL or user profile URL
children.output: Downloaded video files, JSON metadata, thumbnails, subtitles, and comments
children.opsecNote: Makes direct HTTP requests to TikTok to download content; IP is visible to the platform.

children.name: Bellingcat Meta Content Library
children.description: Bellingcat's guide to Meta's Content Library, a research platform providing near-real-time searchable archive of public Threads, Facebook, and Instagram content.
children.bestFor: Large-scale Threads content search for academic and non-profit research
children.input: Search queries, date ranges, content filters
children.output: Public posts, engagement metrics, and text-in-image search results from Threads and other Meta platforms
children.opsecNote: Searches Meta's research archive; does not interact with target accounts directly. Requires academic/non-profit eligibility approval.

children.name: Threads Dashboard
children.description: Analytics and insights platform for Threads accounts using the official API. Tracks audience demographics, engagement metrics, and historical posting data.
children.bestFor: Threads account analytics and engagement investigation
children.output: Audience demographics, engagement rates, posting frequency, optimal posting times, and historical data
children.opsecNote: Retrieves data via Meta's official Threads API; no direct contact with the target account.

children.name: Threads-Scraper (T)
children.description: Python browser automation tool that scrapes public Threads posts and profiles without authentication, outputting structured data in JSON, CSV, or XML. Last updated July 2023.
children.bestFor: Bulk extraction of Threads posts for offline analysis
children.input: Threads profile URL or post URL
children.output: Extracted posts in JSON, CSV, or XML format with metadata
children.opsecNote: Scrapes Threads directly; depends on site structure and may trigger rate limiting.

children.name: ThreadsRecon (T)
children.description: Python OSINT tool for Threads profile analysis including sentiment analysis, network visualization, and automated PDF reporting.
children.bestFor: Threads profile investigation with sentiment and network analysis
children.output: Profile analysis, sentiment scores, network graphs, and PDF investigation reports
children.opsecNote: Makes direct requests to Threads to collect profile and post data for analysis.

children.name: InfoFlow Public People Search In Chilean
The World Bank Open Data Catalog
OpenSanctions
children.description: Aggregated database of sanctioned entities, politically exposed persons, and persons of criminal interest from 329 global data sources.
children.bestFor: Bulk sanctions and PEP screening across consolidated global watchlists
children.output: Entity profiles with sanctions designations, PEP flags, and source metadata
children.opsecNote: Passive lookups against a public database; API usage requires an account and is logged.

children.name: OFAC Sanctions List Search
children.description: Official U.S. Treasury tool for searching OFAC Specially Designated Nationals and related sanctions lists with approximate string matching.
children.bestFor: Checking individuals or entities against U.S. sanctions programs
children.input: Name, address, entity type, ID number, or sanctions program
children.output: Matched records with name, sanctions program, list designation, and confidence score
children.opsecNote: Public U.S. government search tool; queries are submitted to a federal server and may be logged.

children.name: EU Sanctions Tool (D)
children.description: European Commission tool for searching EU restrictive measures and consolidated sanctions lists targeting persons, entities, and bodies.
children.bestFor: Checking individuals or entities against EU sanctions regimes
children.output: Matches against EU consolidated sanctions list with designation details
children.opsecNote: Public EU government search tool; queries are submitted to an EU server and may be logged.

children.name: dilisense
children.description: AML compliance platform that screens individuals and entities against sanctions, PEP, and watchlist data sources with fuzzy matching and confidence scoring.
children.bestFor: Commercial AML/KYC sanctions screening and PEP checks
children.input: Name, date of birth, citizenship, or other identifying information
children.output: Match results with entity details, list sources, and confidence scores
children.opsecNote: Queries sent to dilisense servers; registration required so searches are tied to an account.

children.name: NameScan
children.description: Compliance screening platform providing sanctions checks, PEP screenings, and adverse media searches against global government databases with a free tier.
children.bestFor: Quick free sanctions and PEP screening with adverse media checks
children.output: Screening reports with sanctions matches, PEP flags, and adverse media hits
children.opsecNote: Free scans available without registration; full access requires account creation.

children.name: OpenScreening
children.description: Free graph-based PEP and sanctions screening tool by Linkurious that visualizes connections across persons of interest using OpenSanctions and ICIJ data.
children.bestFor: Visualizing connections between sanctioned entities, PEPs, and offshore structures
children.output: Interactive graph visualizations showing entity relationships and sanctions connections
children.opsecNote: Web-based search against public datasets hosted by Linkurious; queries are sent to their servers.

children.name: Companies House (R)
children.description: Official UK government register for searching company information, officer appointments, and disqualified directors across all UK-registered companies.
children.bestFor: Looking up UK company details, officers, and filing history
children.input: Company name, company number, or officer name
children.output: Company profiles, registered addresses, officer appointments, filing history, and document images
children.opsecNote: Public UK government service; searches are passive lookups against an open register.

children.name: OpenOwnership
children.description: Global hub for beneficial ownership transparency, providing data standards and a register linking corporate ownership data across jurisdictions.
children.bestFor: Investigating beneficial ownership of corporate entities across jurisdictions
children.input: Company name, jurisdiction, or person name
children.output: Beneficial ownership chains, corporate structures, and linked entities across registers
children.opsecNote: Public web queries against open data; no notification to subjects.

children.name: ICIJ Offshore Leaks Database
children.description: Searchable database of 800,000+ offshore entities from ICIJ investigations including Panama Papers, Paradise Papers, and Pandora Papers.
children.bestFor: Tracing offshore company structures and hidden ownership from leaked documents
children.input: Person name, company name, address, or jurisdiction
children.output: Entity records, officer relationships, intermediary connections, and network graphs
children.opsecNote: Public database queries; no notification to subjects. Bulk data also available for download.

children.name: OCCRP Aleph (R)
children.description: Global archive of research material for investigative reporting, aggregating public records, court filings, company registries, and leaks from 200+ sources.
children.bestFor: Cross-referencing persons and companies across public records, leaks, and investigative datasets
children.input: Person name, company name, or document keywords
children.output: Entity profiles, linked datasets, document matches, and relationship mappings
children.opsecNote: Registration required for full access; queries are logged by OCCRP but subjects are not notified.

children.name: PepChecker (R)
children.description: PEP and sanctions screening tool offering checks against comprehensive PEP lists and global sanctions databases with a free tier of limited searches.
children.bestFor: Screening individuals against PEP lists and international sanctions databases
children.output: PEP match results, sanctions list matches, risk indicators, and political exposure details
children.opsecNote: Web-based queries; registration required for workspace features. Subjects are not notified.

children.name: Ukraine PEP Register (D)
children.description: Formerly a database of Ukrainian politically exposed persons maintained by civil society. Now redirects to a static wartime advocacy page.
children.bestFor: Previously used for checking Ukrainian politically exposed persons
children.output: PEP profiles and political positions (when operational)
children.opsecNote: Site is no longer functional; original database was a public web lookup.

children.name: EveryPolitician
children.description: Global database of political office-holders now operated as part of the OpenSanctions project, providing structured data on politicians and public officials worldwide.
children.bestFor: Looking up current and former political office-holders globally for PEP screening
children.input: Person name, country, or political position
children.output: Politician profiles, positions held, party affiliations, and jurisdictional data
children.opsecNote: Public database queries against open data; no notification to subjects.

children.name: US Nav Guide Zip Code Data
PubMed - National Center for Biotechnology Information
Live Journal Seek
children.description: Search tool for LiveJournal journals and communities across public entries that are indexed.
children.bestFor: Finding public LiveJournal entries and historical community discussions
children.output: Matching journal entries with author, date, and snippets
children.opsecNote: Searches publicly indexed content and does not contact journal owners directly; queries are likely logged.

children.name: Blog Search Engine
children.description: Blog-focused search engine for discovering blog posts, directories, and RSS-connected content.
children.bestFor: Blog discovery and topic-focused blog post searching
children.output: Matching blog posts, listings, and feed-linked results
children.opsecNote: Aggregates publicly indexed blog data without direct user contact to target blogs; queries are logged.

children.name: Discord Bot List
children.description: Searchable directory of Discord bots with listings, categories, and discovery metadata.
children.bestFor: Discord bot discovery and ecosystem mapping
children.output: Bot profiles with descriptions, ratings, and invite metadata
children.opsecNote: Enumerates publicly listed bots and does not require direct Discord account interaction for browsing.

children.name: ReconXplorer (T)
children.description: Open-source reconnaissance toolkit with modules for IP, email, and Discord-focused lookups.
children.bestFor: Multi-input OSINT checks from a local scriptable toolkit
children.input: IP addresses, emails, Discord tokens, and host data
children.output: Recon results including geolocation, service, and account-related metadata
children.opsecNote: Runs direct external queries from the operator environment and may trigger service-side detection or logging.

children.name: Top.gg
children.description: Large Discord bot and app discovery platform with ranking, filtering, and listing data.
children.bestFor: Discord bot ranking analysis and app discovery
children.input: Bot names, tags, and search filters
children.output: Bot listings with popularity, server counts, and profile details
children.opsecNote: Uses public listing data and does not require direct target interaction for standard browsing.

children.name: BoardReader
children.description: Forum search engine that indexes discussions across message boards and community platforms.
children.bestFor: Finding forum threads and topic-centric discussion history
children.input: Keywords, forum names, and topical queries
children.output: Indexed posts and thread references with source links
children.opsecNote: Searches indexed forum content and avoids direct interaction with target forum users.

children.name: Omgili
children.description: Forum and discussion search capability operated through Webz.io infrastructure and data products.
children.bestFor: Forum discussion discovery with optional API-driven workflows
children.output: Discussion posts and thread-level matching results
children.opsecNote: Uses indexed discussion datasets from a third-party provider; user-side browsing is passive.

children.name: Craigslist Forums
children.description: Craigslist-hosted forum system for public community discussions and region-oriented threads.
children.bestFor: Reviewing Craigslist community discussions and regional forum activity
children.input: Forum categories, keywords, and regional navigation
children.output: Forum threads, post content, and timing context
children.opsecNote: Reads publicly visible forum content and does not require direct messaging or contact with users.

children.name: Delphi Forum Search
children.description: Forum platform with searchable user communities across niche interest categories.
children.bestFor: Niche forum discovery and historical community thread review
children.output: Forum listings, thread titles, and message pages
children.opsecNote: Public forum browsing is passive; some communities may require registration for deeper access.

children.name: Google Groups Search
children.description: Search interface for Google Groups and archived discussion content, including historical threads.
children.bestFor: Researching archived mailing-list and discussion-group content
children.input: Keywords, group names, authors, and date ranges
children.output: Thread messages and group-level discussion results
children.opsecNote: Searches archived public discussions through Google-hosted infrastructure where activity is logged.

children.name: Mibbit
children.description: Former web IRC client and channel search service that is no longer operational.
children.bestFor: Legacy reference for historical IRC channel search workflows
children.output: No current output; service is discontinued
children.opsecNote: Service shut down on August 30, 2024 and cannot be relied on for active workflows.

children.name: IRCP (T)
children.description: Python-based IRC probing utility for scanning servers and collecting network/channel metadata.
children.bestFor: IRC server enumeration and protocol-level reconnaissance
children.input: Target ranges, IRC ports, and server parameters
children.output: Server and channel metadata in machine-readable output
children.opsecNote: Actively connects to IRC services and may be detectable by network monitoring and server logs.

children.name: ircsnapshot (T)
children.description: IRC data collection tool that connects bots to servers for user and channel mapping.
children.bestFor: IRC topology mapping and user/channel relationship analysis
children.input: IRC server details, bot config, and channel targets
children.output: Collected user, hostmask, and channel affiliation data
children.opsecNote: Requires active network participation via bot accounts and is likely visible to channel operators.

children.name: netsplit.de
children.description: IRC directory and search portal for channel listings, network stats, and discovery workflows.
children.bestFor: Passive IRC channel discovery and network trend checks
children.input: Channel names, keywords, and network filters
children.output: Channel listings with network and user-count context
children.opsecNote: Uses aggregated indexed IRC data and does not require direct IRC server interaction for searches.

children.name: Arctic Shift
children.description: Search and access layer for Reddit datasets with tools for historical content retrieval and analysis.
children.bestFor: Historical Reddit dataset analysis and subreddit research
children.input: Search terms, dataset queries, or API-style requests
children.output: Matching Reddit posts, comments, and metadata from indexed datasets
children.opsecNote: Works against archived or indexed data sources without requiring direct engagement with target accounts.

children.name: Cama's Reddit Search
children.description: Web tool for searching Reddit posts and comments by author, subreddit, text, and time filters.
children.bestFor: Reddit user and subreddit content discovery
children.input: Usernames, subreddits, keywords, and date constraints
children.output: Filtered post/comment search results with metadata
children.opsecNote: Uses public data indexing paths; original GitHub hosting was discontinued but alternative hosting remains available.

children.name: Reveddit
children.description: Interface for viewing Reddit content removals using archived and moderation-related visibility signals.
children.bestFor: Investigating deleted or removed Reddit discussions
children.input: Reddit URLs, usernames, or subreddit paths
children.output: Recovered or flagged removed-content views with moderation indicators
children.opsecNote: Queries archive-backed sources and public content pathways without direct contact to target users.

children.name: Internet Archive: Wayback Machine
children.description: Web archive providing historical snapshots of websites captured over time.
children.bestFor: Historical website analysis, deleted content recovery
children.output: Archived web page snapshots with timestamps
children.opsecNote: Queries archived data. Does not contact the target. Searches may be logged by the Internet Archive.

children.name: Labled Faces in the Wild DB
Paterva / Maltego (T)
children.description: Visual link analysis tool for mapping relationships between people, companies, domains, and infrastructure.
children.bestFor: Link analysis, relationship mapping, entity correlation
children.input: Domain, email, IP, name, phone number
children.output: Entity relationship graph, linked records, transform results

children.name: VirusTotal
children.description: Multi-engine file and URL scanner that aggregates results from 70+ antivirus engines and threat feeds.
children.bestFor: Malware analysis, URL reputation, file hash lookups
children.input: File, file hash, URL, domain, IP address
children.output: Detection results, behavioral analysis, community comments, related indicators
children.opsecNote: Uploaded files become visible to other VirusTotal users. Hash lookups are private.
